dependencies.role: Edge entrypoint that fans out to core and operator APIs for external callers
Domain services (user/org/pack/jobs) that consume core types and feed the gateway
Control-plane orchestrator that coordinates agent dispatch based on core plans
Worker pool executing tasks issued by the operator using core protocol contracts
Next.js frontend consuming the gateway and exposing workspace/console surfaces
Railway/Cloudflare/IaC definitions that publish registry data and discovery rules
